skill.name: supabase-automation
skill.description: Automate Supabase database queries, table management, project administration, storage, edge functions, and SQL execution via Rube MCP (Composio). Always search tools first for current schemas.
skill.summary: Automate Supabase database operations including queries, schema inspection, project management, and SQL execution through Rube MCP.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: All 203 static findings are false positives. The skill uses Rube MCP (a legitimate Model Context Protocol server) to interact with Supabase APIs. The flagged patterns are: (1) Backtick syntax in markdown documentation for code examples - not actual shell execution; (2) Reference to rube.app/mcp endpoint - legitimate service URL; (3) Documentation about handling API keys - not actual secret access; (4) SQL query examples - not crypto or reconnaissance. This is a genuine Supabase automation skill with no malicious intent.

content.value_statement: Automate Supabase database queries, schema inspection, project management, and SQL execution through Rube MCP integration for seamless database administration.
actual_capabilities: Query and filter Supabase database tables using PostgREST operators
Execute raw SQL queries with read-only safety options
List and inspect database schemas, tables, and relationships
Manage Supabase projects, organizations, and API keys
List and inspect storage buckets and edge functions
Generate TypeScript types from database schemas
limitations: Requires Rube MCP server to be configured and connected
Cannot create or deploy edge functions (read-only inspection only)
SQL execution has a ~60 second timeout for complex operations
Cannot directly upload files to storage buckets

use_cases.title: Database Developer Workflows
use_cases.description: Query tables, inspect schemas, and execute SQL for data manipulation without leaving the AI assistant

use_cases.title: Project Administration
use_cases.description: Manage Supabase projects, organizations, and monitor service health through AI commands

use_cases.title: Schema Exploration and Type Generation
use_cases.description: Discover database structure and automatically generate TypeScript types for type-safe applications

prompt_templates.title: List Database Tables
prompt_templates.prompt: List all tables in my Supabase project. First find the project reference, then list tables in the public schema.

prompt_templates.title: Query Table with Filters
prompt_templates.prompt: Query the users table to find all records where the status equals 'active', ordered by created_at descending, limit 10.

prompt_templates.title: Execute Complex SQL
prompt_templates.prompt: Run a SQL query to count users by status and return the results in a readable format.

prompt_templates.title: Generate TypeScript Types
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate TypeScript types for all tables in the public schema of my Supabase project.

output_examples.input: List all tables in my Supabase project
output_examples.output: Found 5 tables: users, products, orders, inventory, analytics. Each table includes row count estimates and size information.

output_examples.input: Get the schema for the users table
output_examples.output: Users table columns: id (uuid), email (text), created_at (timestamp), status (text). Foreign keys: none. Indexes: id (primary), email (unique).

output_examples.input: Check service health for my project
output_examples.output: All services healthy: auth (operational), db (operational), rest (operational), storage (operational), realtime (operational).

best_practices: Always call RUBE_SEARCH_TOOLS first to get current tool schemas before starting a workflow
Use read_only: true for SELECT queries to prevent accidental mutations
Verify connection status shows ACTIVE before running any Supabase operations
anti_patterns: Do not use JSON array syntax for PostgreSQL array columns - use ARRAY['item1', 'item2']
Do not omit schema prefix for case-sensitive table names - use "public"."MyTable"
Do not leave services array empty when checking service health status

faq.question: What is Rube MCP?
faq.answer: Rube MCP is a Model Context Protocol server that provides tools for interacting with Supabase. It is a legitimate service from Composio.

faq.question: Do I need API keys to use this skill?
faq.answer: No. Rube MCP does not require API keys. You only need to configure it as an MCP server in your client.

faq.question: Can this skill modify my database?
faq.answer: Yes, but only if you use the RUN_SQL_QUERY tool. SELECT_FROM_TABLE is read-only. Always use read_only: true for safety.

faq.question: What are the project reference requirements?
faq.answer: Project references must be exactly 20 lowercase letters (a-z only). Pattern: ^[a-z]{20}$

faq.question: Can I create edge functions with this skill?
faq.answer: No. This skill provides read-only tools for listing and inspecting edge functions only.

faq.question: How do I handle case-sensitive table names?
faq.answer: Use double quotes around case-sensitive identifiers in SQL, like SELECT * FROM "MyTable" not SELECT * FROM MyTable.
